text: We developed and trained our recruitment AI system entirely in-house. Our machine learning team built the underlying model on proprietary hiring outcome datasets collected over three years of operation.
label: provider
note: clear provider: developed + trained in-house

text: TechCorp GmbH has placed this document analysis system on the market under its own name. We hold full intellectual property rights over the algorithm, training pipeline, and inference infrastructure.
label: provider
note: placed on market + IP ownership

text: Our deep learning model for fraud detection was designed and built by our internal research division. We provide this AI solution to financial institutions on a subscription basis.
label: provider
note: we designed/built + provide to customers

text: The credit risk scoring system described in this document was created by DataLens AG. We trained our own neural network on historical loan performance records from partner banks.
label: provider
note: we trained our own neural network

text: We are the provider of the MediScan AI imaging system. Our engineering team produced the underlying model, and we maintain ongoing technical updates and clinical validation.
label: provider
note: we are the provider + our engineering team produced

text: Our proprietary AI model for legal document review was built by a cross-functional team of software engineers and legal experts. We place this product on the European market under our brand.
label: provider
note: proprietary AI + placed on European market

text: Wir haben unser KI-System zur Risikoklassifizierung vollständig selbst entwickelt und trainiert. Das Modell wird als Anbieter auf dem deutschen Markt angeboten und von uns laufend verbessert.
label: provider
note: German: wir haben entwickelt + als Anbieter

text: Firma Sigma AI GmbH bringt dieses System in Verkehr. Als Anbieter haben wir das Modell auf eigenen Servern trainiert und sind für die technische Dokumentation verantwortlich.
label: provider
note: German: in Verkehr + Anbieter + eigene Server

text: We have deployed an AI-powered document classification tool licensed from VendorCorp. Our IT department configured the system and integrated it into our document management workflow.
label: deployer
note: deployed + licensed from vendor

text: Our hospital implemented an AI diagnostic support system supplied by MedTech Solutions under a multi-year service agreement. We operate the system in our radiology department.
label: deployer
note: implemented + supplied by vendor + we operate

text: The university purchased an automated essay scoring system from EduAI Ltd and deployed it for grading assignments in undergraduate programmes. We are the operator responsible for student interactions.
label: deployer
note: purchased + we are the operator

text: We use a third-party AI algorithm developed and owned by FinanceAI Inc. to process loan applications. Our compliance team monitors the algorithm's decisions and maintains override records.
label: deployer
note: use a third-party AI + developed and owned by vendor

text: Our organisation deployed an external AI recruitment platform from TalentBot under a SaaS agreement. We configured the screening criteria but did not develop or train the underlying model.
label: deployer
note: deployed external AI + did not develop or train

text: We are using a vendor's AI system for predictive maintenance scheduling across our production facilities. The system was purchased from IndustrialAI GmbH two years ago.
label: deployer
note: using a vendor's AI system + purchased from vendor

text: Wir betreiben eine lizenzierte KI-Lösung eines externen Anbieters zur automatischen Rechnungsverarbeitung. Das Modell wurde von einem Drittanbieter entwickelt und wird von uns als Betreiber eingesetzt.
label: deployer
note: German: wir betreiben + lizenziert + Betreiber

text: Unser Unternehmen nutzt ein KI-gestütztes Bewerberauswahlsystem, das wir von einem spezialisierten Personaldienstleister lizenziert haben. Wir sind für den Einsatz im Rahmen unserer Recruitingprozesse verantwortlich.
label: deployer
note: German: nutzt + lizenziert + Einsatz

text: We import this AI-powered biometric access control system from a manufacturer established in South Korea. As the official EU importer, we verify that the product meets CE marking requirements before distribution.
label: importer
note: import + manufacturer outside EU + EU importer

text: Our company acts as the official importer of an AI-based medical imaging system developed by a company established outside the European Union. We are responsible for ensuring the system complies with EU AI Act obligations.
label: importer
note: acts as importer + established outside EU + EU AI Act

text: We bring to the European market an AI content moderation system whose technology was developed by a company established in the United States. As importer, we conduct compliance checks prior to placing the system with EU customers.
label: importer
note: bring to European market + developed outside EU + importer compliance checks

text: Als Einführer dieses KI-Systems, das von einem in Kanada ansässigen Unternehmen entwickelt wurde, sind wir verantwortlich für die Überprüfung der Konformität mit dem EU-KI-Gesetz vor der Markteinführung.
label: importer
note: German: Einführer + außerhalb EU ansässig

text: Wir importieren ein KI-gestütztes Diagnosesystem eines außerhalb der EU entwickelten Herstellers. Als Einführer gewährleisten wir, dass das System vor dem Inverkehrbringen alle europäischen Sicherheitsanforderungen erfüllt.
label: importer
note: German: importieren + Einführer + vor dem Inverkehrbringen

text: Our company distributes the ClearDoc AI document processing platform on behalf of its developer. We resell the solution to law firms across Germany and Austria without modifying the underlying system.
label: distributor
note: distributes on behalf of developer + resell + without modifying

text: We make this AI translation platform available to professional service providers in the DACH market. As distributor, we do not alter the model weights, training data, or system behaviour.
label: distributor
note: make available + as distributor + do not alter

text: Our role is to distribute third-party AI risk assessment tools to insurance companies. We do not develop or modify the AI systems and act solely as the market channel between provider and end user.
label: distributor
note: distribute third-party + do not develop or modify + market channel

text: Wir als Händler vertreiben dieses KI-System an Endkunden im deutschsprachigen Raum. Wir nehmen keine Änderungen am Modell vor und sind ausschließlich für den Vertrieb verantwortlich.
label: distributor
note: German: Händler + vertreiben + keine Änderungen

text: Unser Unternehmen stellt KI-gestützte Qualitätssicherungssysteme für die Fertigungsindustrie zur Verfügung. Wir vertreiben Produkte externer Anbieter und modifizieren die zugrunde liegenden Modelle nicht.
label: distributor
note: German: zur Verfügung stellen + vertreiben + nicht modifizieren

text: This policy document sets out our AI governance framework for the use of third-party tools across our organisation. Several AI applications have been licensed from external software vendors and integrated into our operational workflows.
label: deployer
note: ambiguous: licensed from external vendors + integrated = deployer

text: We procured an AI-based translation system from a specialist vendor following a competitive tender process. Our team manages the system configuration and monitors output quality on an ongoing basis.
label: deployer
note: procured from vendor + our team manages configuration

text: Our engineering department built a custom natural language processing pipeline to automate the extraction of key clauses from supplier contracts. The model was trained on 50,000 annotated agreements.
label: provider
note: built custom NLP pipeline + trained on annotated data = provider

text: DataVision AG entwickelt und vertreibt KI-Softwareprodukte für den Mittelstand. Unser aktuelles Angebot umfasst proprietäre Modelle für Dokumentenanalyse, die wir in Eigenregie trainiert haben.
label: provider
note: German: entwickelt + proprietäre Modelle + in Eigenregie trainiert

text: We import and resell AI-powered legal research tools originally produced by a company based in the United Kingdom. Our role combines importing compliance responsibilities with distributor activities across the EU market.
label: importer
note: import + produced outside EU + importing compliance responsibilities
